  2. "The seer," or "the kingï¿½s seer," i.e. Davidï¿½s (1ï¿½Chronicles 29:29; 2ï¿½Chronicles 29:25) was a "prophet" who appears to have joined David when in the old. (1ï¿½Samuel 22:5) (B.C. 1061.)
